reason: Both correctly land on fix-not-kill, the ~2.2 LTV:CAC ratio versus a 3:1 benchmark, and the ~6-month payback. Both cover negative keywords, campaign-level CAC segmentation, and closed-won conversion tracking. B additionally covers intent-tier segmentation (competitor/pricing terms vs broad/awareness), landing page/offer-match with a concrete number (20% CVR lift to ~$750 CAC), and channel-level LTV variance, touching on blended vs paid CAC, points A omits. A's edge is an explicit comparison to SEO/content/outbound as compounding-return alternatives, which B lacks. Both are concise with minimal padding. B covers more of the specified key fix levers, giving it a modest edge.
